2605.00400.title: FollowTable: A Benchmark for Instruction-Following Table Retrieval
2605.00400.paper_summary: Table Retrieval (TR) has traditionally been formulated as an ad-hoc retrieval problem, where relevance is primarily determined by topical semantic similarity. With the growing adoption of LLM-based agentic systems, access to structured data is increasingly instruction-driven, where relevance is conditional on explicit content and schema constraints rather than topical similarity alone. We therefore formalize Instruction-Following Table Retrieval (IFTR), a new task that requires models to jointly satisfy topical relevance and fine-grained instruction constraints. We identify two core challenges in IFTR: (i) sensitivity to content scope, such as inclusion and exclusion constraints, and (ii) awareness of schema-grounded requirements, including column semantics and representation granularity--capabilities largely absent in existing retrievers. To support systematic evaluation, we introduce FollowTable, the first large-scale benchmark for IFTR, constructed via a taxonomy-driven annotation pipeline. We further propose a new metric, termed the Instruction Responsiveness Score, to evaluate whether retrieval rankings consistently adapt to user instructions relative to a topic-only baseline. Our results indicate that existing retrieval models struggle to follow fine-grained instructions over tabular data. In particular, they exhibit systematic biases toward surface-level semantic cues and remain limited in handling schema-grounded constraints, highlighting substantial room for future improvements.
2605.00400.paper_summary_zh: 表格檢索 (TR) 傳統上被定義為一種臨時檢索問題，其中相關性主要由主題語義相似性決定。隨著基於 LLM 的代理系統日益普及，對結構化數據的訪問越來越依賴於指令驅動，其中相關性取決於明確的內容和架構約束，而不僅僅是主題相似性。因此，我們正式定義了遵循指令的表格檢索 (IFTR)，這是一項新任務，要求模型共同滿足主題相關性和細緻的指令約束。我們在 IFTR 中確定了兩個核心挑戰：(i) 對內容範圍的敏感性，例如包含和排除約束，以及 (ii) 對基於架構的要求的認識，包括列語義和表示粒度——這些能力在現有檢索器中基本缺失。為了支持系統評估，我們引入了 FollowTable，這是首個大規模的 IFTR 基準，通過一個基於分類法的標註流程構建。我們進一步提出了一個新的指標，稱為指令響應分數，用於評估檢索排名是否能夠相對於僅基於主題的基線持續適應用戶指令。我們的結果表明，現有的檢索模型在遵循細緻指令方面面臨挑戰。特別是，它們對表面語義線索表現出系統性偏見，並在處理基於架構的約束方面仍然有限，這突顯了未來改進的巨大空間。
2605.00400.author: Rihui Jin et.al.
2605.00400.authors: Rihui Jin, Yuchen Lu, Ting Zhang, Jun Wang, Kuicai Dong, Zhaocheng Du, Dongping Liu, Gang Wang, Yong Liu, Guilin Qi
